title: SP1 scaffold mew-companion-log
goal: Create an isolated companion log scaffold under experiments/mew-companion-log.
highlights: Confirmed the side project stays outside core mew source files.
Rendered a fixture-driven markdown report with minimal Python dependencies.
next_steps: Run the focused pytest command for the side project.
Iterate on the report shape after the first scaffold lands.

morning_journal.title: Morning Journal: SP2 companion output
morning_journal.intention: Make the first journal surface feel calm, fixture-driven, and easy to verify.
gratitude: A small isolated experiment keeps product iteration safe.
Snapshot tests can document the markdown shape.
focus: Preserve the existing companion report CLI behavior.
Add a morning journal mode backed by fixture JSON.
blockers: Avoid touching core mew source files.
morning_journal.closing_prompt: What is the one gentle next action that would make today successful?

evening_journal.title: Evening Journal: SP2 companion output
evening_journal.reflection: The companion log experiment now has room for both planning the day and closing it gently.
wins: Kept the journal surface fixture-driven and easy to snapshot.
Preserved the existing report and morning journal behavior.
learned: A small CLI mode can make a second surface discoverable without changing the default report.
release: No need to solve every future companion prompt in this scaffold.
tomorrow: Run the focused pytest command after reviewing the markdown shape.
evening_journal.closing_prompt: What should be acknowledged before setting the work down for the night?

dream_learning.title: Dream Learning: SP2 companion output
dream_learning.dream: Let the companion notice quiet patterns across the day without turning them into pressure.
signals: Morning intentions and evening reflections both point toward gentle, fixture-driven surfaces.
Small CLI modes keep each companion output discoverable without changing the default report.
learning: Snapshot tests make the markdown contract easy to review.
A final dream/learning mode can connect planning and reflection into one lightweight surface.
practice: Choose one learning signal to carry into tomorrow's experiment.
Keep the next companion iteration isolated under experiments/mew-companion-log.
dream_learning.closing_prompt: What quiet signal wants to become tomorrow's small experiment?

research_digest.title: Research Digest: SP4 static companion output
research_digest.summary: Fixture-backed digest of local research signals; no live feeds are fetched.

entries.title: Mew companion patterns
entries.reason: Connects morning, evening, and dream surfaces into one companion loop.

entries.title: Deterministic digest rendering
entries.reason: Keeps ranking stable for snapshot-style tests and CLI review.

entries.title: Static feed safety
